title: BoardRelationColumn: This column type is not supported yet in the api

posts.author: waswrongassembled (Andre Schade)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

we try to use Monday as kind of a Admin/CRM tool on top of our own platform. Informations fly mainly via the API into Monday and via WebhooK out of it.

A lot of entities are linked in out platform and we therefore we’d need the functionality to link boards/items via API.

Is there kind of a roadmap when this will be implemented/released?

Thanks in advance - best,
Andre

{
  “error_code”: “ColumnValueException”,
  “status_code”: 400,
  “error_message”: “This column type is not supported yet in the api”,
  “error_data”: {
    “column_type”: “BoardRelationColumn”
  }
}

posts.author: waswrongassembled (Andre Schade)
posts.cookedHtml: In the meantime: Is there any other way we can link items between boards besides manual work in the UI?

posts.author: waswrongassembled (Andre Schade)
posts.cookedHtml: Will this be delivered with this roadmap item: “Board Linkage: Link to many boards” ?

posts.author: Normalize (Ian Briggs)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to get this one in as everything is automated except when I have to login and manually link the newly created row with another table.
